recommendations: Improve stock selection criteria: Focus on stocks with PE ratios in the 20-40th percentile range rather than extreme low valuations
Enhance timing signals: Current MACD-based entries are late by 2-3 days on average. Consider adding RSI confirmation
Optimize position sizing: Winning positions averaged only 2.5% allocation vs 4% for losers. Increase conviction sizing
Tighten stop losses: Max drawdown of -8.5% exceeded target. Implement 5% trailing stops on all positions
Reduce holding period for momentum plays: Stocks held >10 days showed diminishing returns. Consider 7-day profit-taking rule
Add sector rotation filter: Technology sector underperformed by 15%. Rotate to consumer staples and healthcare
Improve entry discipline: 3 out of 4 losses came from FOMO entries above resistance. Wait for pullbacks
Enhance fundamental screening: Winners had avg PE of 18.5 vs losers at 28.3. Strengthen valuation filters

key_insights: Best performing strategy: Low PE value plays with strong fundamentals (青岛啤酒, 徐工机械)
Worst performing strategy: High valuation momentum chasing (中粮糖业) and data-blind positions (腾讯)
Win rate of 60% is below target 70%, primarily due to poor position sizing on winners
Risk management needs improvement: Losses averaged -19% vs wins at +27.7%, but position sizing favored losers
Timing gap: Entries 2-3 days late on average, missing 15-20% of potential gains
next_steps: Implement recommended stop-loss tightening to 5% trailing stops
Adjust position sizing algorithm to favor high-conviction value plays
Add RSI confirmation to MACD signals to improve entry timing
Create Hong Kong stock data fallback to avoid blind positions
Review and update PE percentile thresholds based on recent performance data
